title: Multi-URL Research Agent
description: Build an advanced workflow: accept URLs via webhook, expand them into items with Code, fetch each page over HTTP, extract readable text with Code, run a LangChain AI Agent with an OpenAI Chat Model, aggregate results, and return JSON via Respond to Webhook.

exam_blueprint.title: Design workflow skeleton
exam_blueprint.instructions: Include webhook, validation/expansion Code, HTTP fetch, parsing Code, LangChain agent + chat model, aggregate, response, and DNG Submit Level as last required step.

exam_blueprint.title: Connect execution flow
exam_blueprint.instructions: Wire fetch and parse, agent chain, aggregation, HTTP response, then DNG Submit Level.

exam_blueprint.title: Finalize configuration
exam_blueprint.instructions: Tune validation, URLs, prompts, aggregation fields, and DNG Submit challengeId.
